programme.title: Speciale F1 21/05/2026 - Ep. 42 - Speciale F1 21/05/2026
programme.desc: ... Powertrains. - Nel 2026 la Red Bull ha esordito, in partnership con Ford, come motorista: alla scoperta del lavoro di ricerca e di sviluppo della Power Unit di Milton Keynes con Mara Sangiorgio.

programme.title: Ep.2
programme.desc: Alle origini del nuovo talento italiano della F1: in questo episodio il percorso di Antonelli nella massima categoria. Gli alti e bassi dell'anno da rookie, prima della definitiva esplosione del 2026.

programme.title: F1 Paddock Live Pre Gara
programme.desc: L'avvicinamento al Gran Premio con l'analisi di quanto successo nel weekend, le interviste, i giri di riscaldamento delle monoposto e l'atmosfera unica della griglia di partenza prima del via.

programme.title: GP Barcellona: Gara
programme.desc: A Barcellona settima gara del mondiale: tutti a caccia di Kimi Antonelli, dominatore del mondiale e reduce da 5 vittorie consecutive. Telecronaca di Carlo Vanzini, Marc Gene' e Roberto Chinchero.

programme.title: F1 Paddock Live Post Gara
programme.desc: I commenti dei piloti e dei team principal accompagnano l'analisi della gara appena conclusa. Con Davide Camicioli e tutta la squadra di Sky Sport F1.

programme.title: F1 Debriefing
programme.desc: E' il momento dell'analisi: dopo i giri in pista, giro di opinioni sui temi principali emersi dalla gara e dall'intero weekend. Conduce Davide Camicioli.

programme.title: F1 Notebook 2026 14/06/2026
programme.desc: ... 14/06/2026 F1 Notebook. - Anticipazioni entusiasmanti sulla prossima stagione 2023 direttamente dalla corsia dei box. Il giornalista britannico, esperto di Formula 1, Ted Kravitz racconta le manovre dal paddock e analizza il fine settimana.

programme.title: Spagna
programme.desc: L'analisi del Gran Premio disputato per commentare la gara insieme agli ospiti in studio. Riviviamo i brividi della corsa attraverso le immagini piu' spettacolari e ascoltiamo i commenti a caldo dei protagonisti.

programme.title: Ep.3
programme.desc: Alle origini del nuovo talento italiano della F1: il legame con la famiglia, le amicizie speciali e il mito di Senna. In questo episodio Antonelli ci svela le sue passioni e ci apre le porte di casa.

programme.title: PL: Burnley v Newcastle Hlts
programme.desc: Beaten on Boxing Day, Newcastle stay on the road for a trip to Scott Parker's Burnley, who remain in the bottom three - six points adrift from Premier League safety. (30.12)

programme.title: PL: Chelsea v Bournemouth Hlts
programme.desc: A Bournemouth side in freefall arrive at Stamford Bridge for a Premier League contest with an up-and-down Chelsea, who have only posted one win in their last five. (30.12)

programme.title: PL: Nott'm Forest v Everton Hlts
programme.desc: Forest and Everton meet for the second time this December. At the start of the month, Everton were resounding winners, putting three unanswered goals past Sean Dyche's Forest. (30.12)

programme.title: PL: West Ham v Brighton Hlts
programme.desc: The pressure is on for West Ham in this pivotal Premier League clash with Brighton to close out the year. The Hammers are 18th, now without a win in seven after defeat to Fulham. (30.12)

programme.title: PL: Arsenal v Aston Villa Hlts
programme.desc: On a big night at the Emirates, league leaders Arsenal host an Aston Villa side on an 11-game winning run, the seventh of which coming against the Gunners earlier this month. (30.12)

programme.title: PL: Man Utd v Wolves Hlts
programme.desc: Manchester United face Rob Edwards' winless Wolves in the Premier League. United are searching for back-to-back to wins at Old Trafford after beating Newcastle here on Boxing Day. (30.12)

programme.title: PL: Liverpool v Leeds Hlts
programme.desc: The champions remain at Anfield after beating Wolves 2-1 here as Leeds come next for Liverpool. With ex-Evertonian Dominic Calvert-Lewin in the goals, Leeds are five games unbeaten. (01.01)

programme.title: PL: Crystal Palace v Fulham Hlts
programme.desc: Three wins on the spin and Fulham are breathing down the necks of their London rivals Crystal Palace here, who tasted a third consecutive loss in the Premier League on Sunday. (01.01)

programme.title: PL: Brentford v Spurs Hlts
programme.desc: Bouncing back from consecutive Premier League defeats, another stern test awaits Spurs as Thomas Frank returns to the Gtech Community Stadium to face former side Brentford. (01.01)

programme.title: PL: Sunderland v Man City Hlts
programme.desc: Manchester City's title bid meets a Sunderland-shaped obstacle as Regis Le Bris' impressive Black Cats take on Pep Guardiola's serial Premier League winners at the Stadium of Light. (01.01)

programme.title: PL: Aston Villa v N. Forest Hlts
programme.desc: A chance for Villa to bounce back after a midweek drubbing at the Emirates as Unai Emery's side welcome 17th-placed Forest, who are aiming to avoid a fourth consecutive defeat. (03.01)

programme.title: PL: Brighton v Burnley Hlts
programme.desc: Brighton play host to Burnley at the Amex Stadium in the Premier League. (03.01)

programme.title: PL: Wolves v West Ham Hlts
programme.desc: Wolves play host to West Ham at Molineux in the Premier League. (03.01)

programme.title: SNF: Bournemouth v Arsenal Hlts
programme.desc: On Saturday Night Football, league leaders Arsenal - who ran riot in a 4-1 demolition midweek - begin 2026 at the Vitality, facing a Bournemouth side on a 10-game winless run. (03.01)

programme.title: PL: Spurs v Sunderland Hlts
programme.desc: It's Sunderland at home for Thomas Frank's Spurs after their first goalless draw in 137 Premier League games. The Black Cats held Manchester City to a draw in the week. (04.01)

programme.title: PL: Everton v Brentford Hlts
programme.desc: Coming away 2-0 winners from the City Ground, Everton are back at the Hill Dickinson Stadium for a Premier League encounter with Keith Andrews' in-form Brentford. (04.01)

programme.title: PL: Fulham v Liverpool Hlts
programme.desc: Unbeaten in four, Marco Silva's impressive Fulham provide another test for the champions Liverpool, who come from a goalless draw - the first of Arne Slot's Anfield tenure. (04.01)

programme.title: PL: Newcastle v C. Palace Hlts
programme.desc: Stemming the flow of three consecutive losses at home to Fulham, Palace go to Tyneside next to play Newcastle. The Magpies ended 2025 with a 3-1 win on the road to Burnley. (04.01)

programme.title: PL: Man City v Chelsea Hlts
programme.desc: Falling behind leaders Arsenal, what can Manchester City do in reply on Super Sunday against a Chelsea side coming to grips with the midweek dismissal of manager Enzo Maresca? (04.01)

programme.desc: Find out the inside story on Premier League record-appearance-holder Gareth Barry's failed move from Aston Villa to Liverpool and how Manchester City swooped in instead.

programme.desc: Aryna Sabalenka and Coco Gauff share the stage in a final for the fourth time, with hometown favourite Gauff bidding to deny defending Miami champion Sabalenka the Sunshine Double. (28.03)

programme.title: Tennis Highlights
programme.desc: In a bid to reach the Stuttgart quarter-finals, the United States' Frances Tiafoe - the sixth seed here - looks to overcome Australia's Rinky Hijikata in the round of 16. (11.06)

programme.title: Tennis Highlights
programme.desc: Canada's Felix Auger-Aliassime gets his grass-court season underway in 's-Hertogenbosch as the top seed encounters Márton Fucsovics in the second round. (11.06)

programme.title: Live: ATP/WTA Tennis
programme.desc: Taylor Fritz, the defending champion in Stuttgart, meets Mattia Bellucci. Libema Open top seed Felix Auger-Aliassime plays Kamil Majchrzak and Barbora Krejcikova faces Elena-Gabriela Ruse.

programme.title: ATP Tour This Week
programme.desc: Step behind the scenes of men's professional tennis throughout the 2026 season on the ATP Tour with special features, interviews and much more.

programme.title: Tennis Highlights
programme.desc: Building momentum off the back of an injury layoff, Barbora Krejcikova competes in her first quarter-final of the year at the Libema Open against Elena-Gabriela Ruse. (12.06)

programme.title: Tennis Highlights
programme.desc: Felix Auger-Aliassime, the top seed at the Libema Open, looks to book his place in the tournament's final four in a clash with Kamil Majchrzak. (12.06)

programme.title: Canadian Open 2024 Highlights
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the 2024 RBC Canadian Open - a PGA Tour event staged in Ontario at Hamilton Golf and Country Club. Victory belonged to home favourite Nick Taylor last year.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2014
programme.desc: The story of the 2014 US Open Championship at the No. 2 Course of the Pinehurst Resort in North Carolina. England's Justin Rose came into this event as the defending champion.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: The School of Golf offers tips and tricks on how to improve your golfing game. Here, look at how to make adjustments to your backswing. Ep 20.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: The School of Golf offers tips and tricks on how to improve your golfing game. Here, learn how to emulate professional players to refine your technique. Ep 21.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The third day of the PGA Tour's RBC Canadian Open, taking place at TPC Toronto. Ryan Fox secured his second tour victory in a playoff with Sam Burns last year.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Films
programme.desc: The official film of the 2025 US Open. Battling through the toughest of Oakmont challenges, JJ Spaun became one of the most unlikely Major winners in recent memory.

programme.title: My Ryder Cup: Justin Rose
programme.desc: Playing five of six Ryder Cups from 2008 through to 2018 - and another in 2023 - Justin Rose recalls his memories of the event.

programme.title: PGA Tour Champions Learning Centre
programme.desc: From instruction tips for your game, to fitness advice and lifestyle lessons, hear from the best on the circuit in PGA Tour Champions Learning Centre.

programme.title: Live PGA Tour Golf Early Coverage

programme.title: Live PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The fourth and final day of the PGA Tour's RBC Canadian Open, taking place at TPC Toronto. Ryan Fox secured his second tour victory in a playoff with Sam Burns last year.
